items.title: The 10 Best Super Bowl Commercials That Won the Internet
items.description: These ads were a hit with audiences during the biggest marketing moment of the year.

items.title: These 7 Super Bowl Commercials Bombed—and the Internet Didn’t Hold Back
items.description: From Svedka’s AI-generated Fembot to Ritz’s salty island, here are the brands that fumbled on advertising’s biggest stage.

items.title: After the Super Bowl, Seahawks Coach Mike Macdonald Kept Repeating 2 Words. It’s a Lesson in How to Win
items.description: Macdonald says “stacking wins” is a core philosophy of the Seahawks. Here’s what it means, and how you can use it in your workplace.

items.title: 3 Ways to Prevent Division in a Multigenerational Workplace
items.description: This is not just a people strategy. It is a business imperative.

items.title: Startups Are Quietly Cutting Equity Payouts—Except at AI Companies
items.description: The ownership perk that motivates may people to enter the tech field is getting less lucrative.
